top_tweets.text: The first Apple glasses will use design to stand out, with oval-shaped cameras, unique colors and multiple frame styles. Over time, Apple believes the glasses could evolve into a health device and eventually incorporate AR technologies capable of improving how people see.
top_tweets.author: markgurman
top_tweets.name: Mark Gurman
top_tweets.summary_zh: Apple 首款眼鏡將以橢圓鏡頭、獨特配色和多種鏡框設計來建立差異化，長期目標是演進為健康裝置並整合 AR 技術來增強視覺能力。

top_tweets.text:
This vocabulary is a side-effect of domain expertise. Having domain expertise makes you way better at getting what you actually want from AI relative to other people.

So learn how to code, learn design, all the fundamentals. It’s incredibly revelant, and it will stay relevant.
top_tweets.author: emilkowalski
top_tweets.name: Emil Kowalski
top_tweets.summary_zh: 領域專業知識讓你在使用 AI 時能更精準表達需求，因此學習程式、設計等基礎能力仍然非常重要且將持續保持相關性。

top_tweets.text: Congrats to this year’s Apple Design Award winners! We love seeing the creativity, thoughtfulness, and exceptional experiences developers bring to apps and games each year and we’re excited to see what they dream up next. Can’t wait to celebrate at #WWDC26! https://t.co/UNSRmGSW30
top_tweets.author: gregjoz
top_tweets.name: Greg Joswiak
top_tweets.summary_zh: Apple 公布本年度設計獎得主，表彰開發者在 app 與遊戲中展現的創意、細膩思考與傑出體驗。

top_tweets.text: One of the cleanest Google design updates in years. https://t.co/xEjYc4zWsU
top_tweets.author: Sarthak4Alpha
top_tweets.name: Sarthak
top_tweets.summary_zh: Google 推出近年最簡潔的設計更新，獲得不少正面評價。

top_tweets.text:
$NVDA and $FLNC developed a reference architecture for Nvidia DSX Vera Rubin NVL72 AI data centers.

The 136 MW design supports 100 MW of IT load with Fluence battery storage built in for grid stability, backup power, demand response and AI load smoothing. https://t.co/5MFwFgpa2Q
top_tweets.author: StockSavvyShay
top_tweets.name: Shay Boloor
top_tweets.summary_zh: Nvidia 與 Fluence 共同發表 AI 資料中心參考架構，136 MW 設計支援 100 MW IT 負載並整合電池儲能以穩定電網、提供備援與平滑 AI 負載。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
